ground_truth_summary: ARTNIGHT poster: red/orange fiery horse painting (acrylic/oil, impasto) over dark blue swirling background, 3 stylized trees with brown/orange leaves on the right side (suspended in air), VIC Health Club + VIC Art Club logos in top-left corner (both on left, side-by-side), title 'PAINT YOUR MASTERPIECE / ARTNIGHT / TUESDAY 14 APRIL | 17:00 | THE VIC', QR code bottom-right with 'Scan to register / vichealth.club'.

key_hits: Correctly identifies ARTNIGHT title and full event details
Recognizes horse, swirling background, impasto/texture
Identifies both VIC Health Club and VIC Art Club logos
Mentions trees/branch structures with orange-red on right
Correctly places QR code bottom-right with Scan to register / vichealth.club
key_misses: Says VIC Art Club logo is 'top right' (both logos are actually top-left, side-by-side)
Does not note trees are suspended in air (deliberate artistic choice)
hallucinations: Says 'three stylized figures' in VIC Art Club logo — actually a statue motif, not three figures
Top-right placement of Art Club logo is incorrect
judgments.justification: Strong overall description with all key text verbatim and good visual analysis. Minor positional error on Art Club logo placement and a slight misread of the logo's contents keep it from a perfect score.

key_hits: Captures all verbatim text correctly
Recognizes fiery red-orange horse in dynamic pose
Notes impasto/textured paint style
Identifies swirling blue/teal background and trees/reeds on right
Mentions both VIC Health and VIC Art clubs
key_misses: Says each logo features 'silhouette of human figure holding a heart' — conflates the two distinct logos
Repeatedly claims text 'appears twice' — false
Logos placement description is generic (upper corners) rather than both top-left
Does not mention trees are suspended in air
hallucinations: 'VIC Health Club (Appears twice)' and 'VIC Art Club (Appears once)' — both logos appear once each
'PAINT YOUR MASTERPIECE (Appears twice)' and 'ARTNIGHT (Appears twice)' — each appears once
Conflates both logos as having 'heart held by figure' — wrong for Art Club
judgments.justification: Good core content but marred by repeated false 'appears twice' claims (likely a thinking artifact), and logo description conflates the two distinct logos. Text OCR is solid.

key_misses: Says 'Two logos aligned horizontally at top-left corner' but then describes them as left+right — slight inconsistency

judgments.justification: Concise and accurate. Distinguishes the two logos correctly (a hard task), captures all text, identifies the horse, background, trees, and QR. Clean response with no hallucinations.
